# Ankur Bag — Full Stack Developer (MERN, AI & GenAI)
# https://www.ankurbag.tech

## Who I Am
Ankur Bag is a Full Stack Developer specializing in MERN stack, AI integrations,
and GenAI-powered applications. He builds scalable web platforms, intelligent interfaces,
and modern AI-driven products. Available for freelance projects, startups, and product development.

## What I Build
- AI-powered web applications and GenAI integrations
- MERN stack web applications (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js)
- Modern Next.js applications with high-performance UI/UX
- AI tools and platforms (design tools, code assistants, automation systems)
- Full-stack SaaS products from idea to deployment
- Developer tools and automation-based web utilities

## Featured Projects
- Cosmic Canvas: AI-powered design platform combining generative AI with layer-based editing
- OutreachX: AI outreach system with voice agents and real-time interaction
- CodeZen: AI-powered code review assistant using LLMs
- Zynor: AI image and video generation platform
- Bihaan 2025: Official event website with advanced animations and UI

## Tech Stack
Frontend: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, GSAP  
Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs  
Database & Services: MongoDB, Firebase  
AI/GenAI: RAG, LLM integrations, AI-powered web applications  
Tools: Git, GitHub, Figma, Framer, Canva, Adobe Photoshop  
Languages: Java, Python, C  

## Experience
- Frontend Developer Intern at Resourcio Pvt Ltd (working on AI platforms like Zynor)
- Web Associate at Google Developer Groups on Campus RCCIIT

## Achievements
- Winner — Double Slash 4.0 (Jadavpur University)
- Winner — ShowcaseX x Techsprint (Hack2Skill)
- Winner — Hello World Hacks (GDG RCCIIT)
- Web Associate — GDG on Campus RCCIIT
- Rajya Puraskar Scout Award (Leadership Recognition)

## Ideal Opportunities
- Startups building AI-powered products or MVPs
- Founders looking for MERN stack or full stack developers
- Teams integrating AI/GenAI into web applications
- Hackathons, innovation challenges, and product builds
- Freelance or contract-based web and AI development work
